title: OT Digital Twin
tagline: Internship project exploring operational technology monitoring and digital twin concepts
problem: Industrial OT environments in East Africa often lack affordable remote monitoring, requiring on-site visits for routine diagnostics.
solution: Explored digital twin concepts for operational technology monitoring, infrastructure visibility, and AI-assisted insights. Built during an internship with limited resources and real constraints.
impact: Presented at EAAAIW 2026. Details are intentionally limited because the work connects to internship, infrastructure, and organizational context.
